meta.description: Deterministic adulting test dataset anchored to 2026-05-02 (Saturday). All deadlines are expressed relative to this anchor so deadline classification is fully predictable.

tasks.title: Pay council tax arrears
tasks.rationale: Council tax arrears trigger enforcement within 7 days.

tasks.title: Submit self-assessment tax return
tasks.rationale: 3 days remaining — HMRC late filing penalty after deadline.

tasks.title: Pay electricity bill
tasks.rationale: 6 days remaining — utility disconnection warning after 14 days overdue.

tasks.title: Renew driving licence
tasks.rationale: 8 days remaining — driving without valid licence is an offence.

tasks.title: Book dentist appointment
tasks.rationale: 14 days remaining — routine check-up, not urgent.

tasks.title: Pay car insurance
tasks.rationale: 28 days remaining — must maintain continuous cover.

tasks.title: Renew passport
tasks.rationale: 74 days remaining — standard renewal takes 3 weeks.

tasks.title: File annual accounts
tasks.rationale: 151 days remaining — Companies House filing deadline.
